MIXEL Test Portal

Internal guided QA portal for end-to-end user testing across MIXEL apps. Accounting has a deep-dive walkthrough with exact click paths and expected outcomes.

Assigned test users can sign in using approved internal credentials. Passwords are not displayed in this portal.

This portal auto-saves progress locally in your browser and exports a PDF incident report.

test.mixel.ch — Guided User Test Control Center

Mixail — QA Assistant
Hi! I'm Mixail, your QA assistant powered by DeepSeek. I know all 12 MIXEL apps and their test cases. Ask me anything about a test step, what to check, or how to mark a result.

🤖 Autonomous AI QA Runner
